page_content:
ANTH674 Language Racism & Identity (3 Credits) This course explores the relationship between language, identity and racism in a variety of social contexts, in the U.S. and elsewhere. Jointly offered with: ANTH474. Credit Only Granted for: ANTH474, ANTH469R, ANTH674, or ANTH689R.

ANTH688 Current Developments in Anthropology (3 Credits) Detailed investigation of a current problem or research technique, the topic to be chosen in accordance with faculty interests and student needs. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
